reason: Successfully verified GitHub tool integration with account access flow, receiving authenticated user information
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded showing agent list with target agent "QA-20260513-195942-udok"
Clicked on "QA-20260513-195942-udok" agent in sidebar — Agent opened and displayed in main content area
Verified agent status is "idle" — Status indicator in top-right shows "idle" confirming agent is ready
Sent message: "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message submitted and agent began processing
GitHub account access card appeared — Modal dialog asking for permission to access GitHub with account already selected (checked)
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button — GitHub account access granted, agent resumed processing
GitHub API permission dialog appeared — Dialog asking to confirm scope for "Allow get the authenticated user?" request
Clicked "Allow Once" button — GitHub API call permission granted with one-time scope
Waited 60 seconds for response — Agent completed processing and returned response
Verified response includes GitHub username — Final message displays "Your GitHub username is yiw190." with tool execution cards showing completed status
